columns.gsis_id: resolved via nflverse_crosswalk.pfr_id <-> this table's pfr_player_id; null = not found in this week's crosswalk
columns.offense_pct: this player's share of the TEAM's offensive snaps that game -- IS phase1 §5's snap_share metric directly, computed by PFR/nflverse, no derivation needed
16 columns total from nflreadpy's load_snap_counts() (Pro Football Reference, via nflverse)
